cleavage agent: with an MS1 mass tolerance of 10 ppm and an MS2 mass tolerance of 25 mmu. Trypsin was selected as the enzyme allowing up to two missed cleavages
collision energy: normalized collision energy of 27 was used.
enrichment method: METTL8-Strep was affinity purified from whole cell extracts on Strep-Tactin resin
fractionation method: fractionated on a NuPAGE 4 to 12% Bis–Tris Protein gel
instrument: connected to a Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
